About Us

We are the
Green Bridge
for Kanpur

We are a youth-driven initiative working to reduce extreme heat in Kanpur through tree plantation, water relief, and community awareness. Every action we take is rooted in urgency and love for our city.

🌍
Founded on Earth Day — 22 April 2026
Hariyali Setu was born on World Earth Day, 22 April 2026 — a deliberate choice to align our birth with the planet's most important annual reminder. On a day when the world reflects on environmental responsibility, we chose action over words.
🌱 Est. 22 April 2026 · Kanpur, UP
🌍
Our Vision
A cooler, greener Kanpur where every street is shaded and every resident thrives.
🎯
Our Mission
Mobilize youth to plant trees, install water stations, and educate on climate resilience.
🤝
Community
Partnering with schools, colleges, and local bodies to create lasting green impact at scale.
💧
Water Relief
Setting up Matka/Pyaau stations across Kanpur's hotspots to provide free drinking water.
Our Programs

What We Do

Five pillars of action, united by one mission — making Kanpur cooler, greener, and more livable for everyone.

01🌳
Tree Plantation Drives

Organized mass plantation drives across schools, parks, and roadways in Kanpur's most heat-affected zones.

Flagship Program
02💧
Water Stations (Matka / Pyaau)

Installing earthen water pots at key public locations — each one serving hundreds of people daily through summer.

Active Year-Round
03🐦
Bird Feeding Campaigns

Distributing feeders and water bowls to support urban biodiversity and raise awareness about city wildlife.

Biodiversity
04🌡️
Urban Cooling Awareness

Street plays, workshops, and door-to-door outreach educating citizens about the urban heat island effect.

Community Education
🏫
Campus Collaborations

We partner with schools, colleges, and universities to run green clubs, plantation events, and eco-awareness programs that inspire the next generation of climate champions.

Schools · Colleges · Universities

🌱 Start Volunteering
Get Involved

Be Part of the Change

Whether you have an hour, a weekend, or a lifetime to give — there's a place for you in Hariyali Setu.

🌱
Volunteer with Us
Join our on-ground team for plantation drives, water station setups, and awareness campaigns.
🚗
Join Plantation Drives
Participate in our monthly drives across Kanpur. No experience needed — just your enthusiasm.
🏫
Collaborate — Schools & Colleges
Partner with us to establish green clubs, organize eco-events, and build sustainability programs on your campus.
📣
Spread the Word
Share our mission on social media or organize awareness sessions in your community.

Volunteer Registration

Fill in your details and we'll get in touch within 48 hours.

✅ Your details are safe with us. We'll never spam you.
Support Our Mission

Make a Real Impact

Every contribution — big or small — directly creates shade, water, and life in our city.

🌳
Sponsor a Tree
Fund the purchase and plantation of one tree, including 6-month survival care.
₹200
🏺
Donate a Matka (Water Pot)
One matka serves ~100 people daily at a public hotspot through peak summer.
₹150
🐦
Bird Food Support
Fund a month of bird seed, water bowls, and feeders across the city.
₹100
💚
General Donation
Support our campaigns, events, outreach, and operational expenses.
Any
🔒
Transparent & Accountable
We publish annual impact reports and maintain full financial transparency.

The People Behind the Trees

Meet Our Founders

Driven by passion, guided by purpose — two young changemakers who turned concern into action.

Prashant Yadav
Co-Founder & Director

A passionate environmentalist and youth leader from Kanpur, Prashant initiated Hariyali Setu to channel the energy of young people into meaningful climate action. He leads ground operations and community partnerships.

Ashutosh Mishra
Co-Founder & Campaign Head

Ashutosh is the creative force behind Hariyali Setu's awareness campaigns and outreach. With a background in community organizing, he builds bridges between institutions, volunteers, and the environment.
